message:
chore: add /test_*.rs to .gitignore; test(oauth): add error trait impl tests

- .gitignore: Add /test_*.rs pattern to ignore standalone scratch test
  scripts at the repo root (test_cbor_map.rs, test_cbor_overflow.rs,
  test_usage.rs, test_wasmtime.rs and future similar files)

- fcp-oauth/error.rs: Add std::error::Error impl verification tests for
  all OAuthError variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -104,6 +104,7 @@ run_test.rs
 test_expand
 test_expand.rs
 test_ip.rs
+/test_*.rs
 
 # Build/test artifacts directory
 artifacts/
